description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden grip. The barrels are arranged side-by-side, both finished in a dark, likely blued or matte black metal, with visible ribbing along the top. The grip and fore-end are made of wood, featuring a smooth, ergonomic contour for comfortable handling. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses two triggers, indicating the ability to fire each barrel independently. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, suitable for close-quarters use. The muzzle end is wide and open, clearly showing the twin barrels.
description: A short, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a wooden grip and dark metal barrels, featuring a rounded trigger guard and twin triggers.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the wooden grip, double barrels, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two open barrels and ribbing along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the grip and barrel details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the width of the barrels and the full wooden grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with visible ribbing and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard enclosing two triggers, with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
